##  From Movement to Data
[ Buy eSteps V2 ](https://estepshealth.com/products/esteps%E2%84%A2-smart-insole-v2-advanced-mobility-tracking-for-everyday-life) [ Elite Solution ](https://estepshealth.com/pages/esteps-b2b-platform)
GET STARTED
##  HOW IT WORKS
STEP ONE
![Wear the eSteps V2 Smart Insole](https://estepshealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Untitled_design_18.png?v=1767976643&width=600)
###  Wear the eSteps V2 Smart Insole
Insert the eSteps V2 Smart Insole into your shoes and start using it instantly, no complex setup or calibration required.
→
STEP TWO
![Move \(Sensors capture gait, balance, and pressure data\)](https://estepshealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Untitled_design_49.png?v=1768064939&width=600)
###  Move (Sensors capture gait, balance, and pressure data)
As you walk, run, or train, embedded sensors continuously capture gait, balance, and plantar pressure data in real time.
→
STEP THREE
![Analyze \(AI creates your Digital Twin in real time on the app\)](https://estepshealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Untitled_design_21.png?v=1767976716&width=600)
###  Analyze (AI creates your Digital Twin in real time on the app)
Advanced AI algorithms analyze your movement data and generate a real-time, digital real-time Digital Twin inside the eSteps App.
→
STEP FOUR
![Improve \(Receive biofeedback for rehabilitation or performance\)](https://estepshealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Untitled_design_20.png?v=1767976733&width=600)
###  Improve (Receive biofeedback for rehabilitation or performance)
Receive clear bio-feedback and insights to optimize rehabilitation, prevent injuries, and improve overall performance.
→

Product Description
Empower Your Movement. Own Your Journey.
The eSteps V2 is not just an insole; it is your daily companion for smarter, more conscious movement. Designed for those who refuse to compromise on their independence, it transforms your favorite shoes into a powerful wellness tracking tool.
Whether you are recovering from an injury, managing reduced mobility, or simply want to stay active and confident as you age, eSteps gives you the data you need to walk with purpose.
####  Why eSteps V2 is for you
*
**Preserve Your Independence:** For those who feel their mobility changing, knowledge is power. Monitor your walking patterns daily to spot trends early. It’s the perfect tool for those who want to stay on their feet and avoid relying on assistive devices for as long as possible.
*
**Visualize Your Recovery:** Are you getting back on your feet after an injury? Stop guessing. Track your rehabilitation progress with real data. See how your balance and step count improve day by day, giving you the motivation to keep going.
*
**Active Aging & Fitness:** Designed for seniors who want to stay fit and confident. Monitor your activity levels, analyze your stability, and maintain a healthy lifestyle with a tool that watches over your steps.
####  Seamless Technology, Zero Hassle
You don't need to be a tech expert to use it.
1.
**Slip them in:** Fits comfortably in sneakers, casual shoes, or everyday footwear.
2.
**Walk:** Go about your day naturally.
3.
**Know:** Let the sensors capture the data that matters.
Your Data, Your Ecosystem.
We know you have a favorite health app. eSteps integrates seamlessly with the platforms you already love, so you can keep all your wellness stats in one place.
✅ Apple Health
✅ Google Fit
✅ Fitbit
...and many more.
####  Technical Specifications
*
**Usage:** General Wellness & Activity Tracking (Non-Medical).
*
**Design:** Ultra-thin, ergonomic profile for maximum comfort.
*
**Connectivity:** Bluetooth Low Energy (Auto-sync).
*
**Sensors:** High-precision pressure mapping and motion detectors.
*
**Battery:** Long-lasting rechargeable battery.
####  What's in the box
*
1x Pair of eSteps Smart Insoles V2 (Left + Right)
*
Dual USB Charging Cable
*
Quick Start Guide
*
Exclusive access to the eSteps App
Shipping & Returns
Shipping cost is based on weight. Just add products to your cart and use the Shipping Calculator to see the shipping price.
We want you to be 100% satisfied with your purchase. Items can be returned or exchanged within 30 days of delivery.

##  What People Are Saying
### Love it so much
Gli eSteps™ Smart Insole V2 hanno superato le mie aspettative. Il monitoraggio in tempo reale del passo e dell’equilibrio è molto preciso e il feedback digitale mi ha aiutato a migliorare la mia riabilitazione dopo un infortunio. Prodotto altamente raccomandato!
**Marco De Santis**
### Love it so much
Le eSteps™ Smart Insole V2 sono davvero incredibili. Il monitoraggio preciso del passo e dell’equilibrio, insieme al feedback digitale, mi aiuta a migliorare la postura e ottimizzare le prestazioni sportive. Un prodotto eccellente per chi desidera un controllo dettagliato.
**Francesca Rossi**
### Love it so much
Ho iniziato a usare gli eSteps™ Smart Insole V2 la scorsa settimana e già noto un miglioramento nel mio equilibrio durante le passeggiate quotidiane. L’analisi dei dati sul dashboard è chiara e molto utile per monitorare i miei progressi. Consigliatissime!
**Luca Bianchi**

tavily.answer: eSteps Health is a medical equipment startup founded in 2020, specializing in remote patient monitoring. The company is headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts, with additional locations in Italy and Tunisia. It has raised $325,000 in pre-seed funding.

tagline: Walk: Go about your day naturally.
